programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Ravaged by a hurricane and overtaken by nature, a low-cost home in need of low-cost renovation looks like the perfect zombie for the team to do a quick, easy flip, until they discover it's home to some wild reptiles.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: A canal-front home features sunken floors, junk-filled rooms, disgusting bathrooms and an addition that's literally falling off the house, forcing the team to create a new floor plan from scratch.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: The team is on a high-stakes roller coaster gambling on a Zombie with a $100,000 reno; will they hit the jackpot or crash and burn? Meanwhile, a perilous property pushes Keith's driving skills to the limit, sending the project into a tailspin; buckle up for a wild ride!

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: Family Business
programme.desc: After a Fourth of July fireworks show gone wrong, a family home was written off, but investor Tommy Harr is betting that, beneath the charred remains, the bones of this house are still salvageable; with his youngest brother, project manager in training Will, taking the reins on his biggest project yet, and his mom, Katie, taking it to the next level with an extra bold design plan, the Harrs are pu

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard is used to partnering with investors, but this time he's taking a leap of faith on someone close to home; his longtime contractor and friend, Kenny, wants to step out from behind the tool belt and partner with James on a flip; Kenny has found a tempting deal in a great part of Seattle, but James knows the transition from contractor to partner isn't easy; Kenny has a history of blowin

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: For Lisa, the hustle is real; Ivy and Pops drop by on their way home from vacation and end up schooling the other buyers; Dave comes out swinging but ends up just playing games; Brandi and Cameron almost take their profits sky-high.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny channels an old friend's tactics, allowing him to pick just the right unit; Brandi flexes her muscles on a dusty locker; Ivy does his best to look beneath the surface, while Rene and Casey gamble big on an even bigger room.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers head to Montebello, where there are a number of lockers for auction; Brandi has the resale market covered; Ivy mines his way into some vintage safety gear.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Everything is coming up "Brandi" in Banning, as she milks all she can out of her buy; Ivy knows good tools when he sees them; Lisa forms some sweet success out of an otherwise bland unit, while Kenny scores on a highbrow horseplay hoard.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers have their worlds rocked in Garden Grove; Ivy learns that there are surprising uses for office equipment; Lisa finds the shiniest bowl she's ever seen; Dusty, getting a rise out of everyone, finds out the true meaning of being a jerk.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: It's a spooky All Hallow's Eve in Huntington Beach, as Kenny books an appearance with his dark side; Brandi finds evidence of a possible payday; Ivy does what he can with whatever he has; Mary's locker requires some rescuing.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy takes an opportunity to practice his dart game as the buyers head to Riverside; Rene exchanges poker for a chance to get his Becker on; Brandi ropes in more than she bargained for, but a surprise shows up.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The gang's all here and then some! The bidders have brought their family members along to the auction to show them the ropes or maybe just for some familial rivalry; team Calvin gets their first ever locker, the Brothers Crossley find some chimes during their quality time, and Gunter tells Rene to gamble on an ATV that hasn't run in years... maybe father really does know best?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Orange, Dave zeroes in on a stack of Benjamins; Dusty and Lupe go really big and manage to stay out of the weeds; Mary gets herself all chakra'd in Fullerton, while she and her Texas Teammate Lisa spawn some seriously spirited stuff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: When a stranger moves in and takes over the new home of Nabih and Kadeisha, Flash and his team are deployed to Dearborn, Michigan with one goal: out squat the squatter. But what starts as a straightforward job becomes a battle of endurance when the trespasser challenges Flash to see who can hold their ground the longest.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash heads to Philadelphia to help Paul, who returns from a stint in Vegas to start a family with his fiancée, only to find a stranger has taken over his Pennsylvania home; when Flash confronts multiple occupants, tensions mount, culminating in a boiling standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Justin and Ashley's plans to sell their home in Auburn, Washington are thrown into chaos when the property is overrun by intruders. When Flash and his team arrive to remove the squatters, what should be a routine civil matter quickly turns criminal, as police descend on the property upending the entire operation.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Cleveland, Ray is ready to move back home-until he discovers an intruder linked to his previous tenant has taken over his house; when Flash and his team step inside, it's anything but a routine squatter removal job; the house is uninhabitable, and the danger runs far deeper than expected.
